zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Guild於1546年2月4日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 瑪麗 亞特 希爾 煙雨 聖 安德魯 賀伯特時，他的父親William Guild29歲，母親Rose Flatman25歲。他於1573年與Joan Erbery在英國英格蘭素福爾可維斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1595年4月19日在英國素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易爾可沙拉爾 聖 瑪格麗特。

nameMeanings.name: Guild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Guild was born on 4 February 1546, in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England, his father, William Guild, was 29 and his mother, Rose Flatman, was 25. He married Joan Erbery in 1573, in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 April 1595, in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Guild est né le 4 février 1546, à London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, William Guild, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Rose Flatman, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joan Erbery en 1573, à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1595, à Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Guild am 4. Februar 1546 in London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Guild 29 und seine Mutter Rose Flatman 25. Er hat 1573 in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Erbery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 1595 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England und wurde in Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Guild è nato il il 4 febbraio 1546 nel London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, William Guild, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Rose Flatman, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joan Erbery nel 1573, nel Westhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1595, nel Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Guildが1546年2月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト マリー アト ヒル ウィス スト アンドリュー ハバードで生まれた時，父William Guildは29歳，母Rose Flatmanは25歳であった。1573年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウエスサルでJoan Erberyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1595年4月19日にイギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト マーガレットで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイルケトシャル スト マーガレットにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hu: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 앳 힐 위스 스트 앤드루 후브바드
ko.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Guild(이)가 1546년 2월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 메리 앳 힐 위스 스트 앤드루 후브바드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Guild(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose Flatman(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1573년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스솔에서 Joan Erbery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1595년 4월 19일 영국 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿에 묻혔다.

pt.4 Feb 1546–19 April 1595: 4 de fevereiro de 1546–19 de abril de 1595
pt.Ilketshall St Margaret, East Suffolk, Su: Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England: Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hu: London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Guild nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1546, em London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Guild, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Rose Flatman, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Erbery em 1573, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1595, em Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ilketshall St Margaret, East Suffolk, Su: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hu: лондон ст мэри ат хилл вит ст андрю хуббард, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Guild родился 4 февраля 1546 г. в местности лондон ст мэри ат хилл вит ст андрю хуббард, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Guild было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Rose Flatman, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Erbery в 1573 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 апреля 1595 г. в местности илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Guild nació el 4 de febrero de 1546, en London St Mary at Hill with St Andrew Hubbard, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Guild, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Rose Flatman, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joan Erbery en 1573, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1595, en Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
